title: Course: COSC 373 - Foundations of Bioinformatics
description: Multidisciplinary course explaining the scope of bioinformatics, discussing computational methods, strategies and software tools for sequence analysis, and protein structure prediction.
prerequisites_text: COSC 112 completed with a grade of C or higher
content:
COSC 373 - Foundations of Bioinformatics
Credits: 4
Prerequisites: COSC 112 completed with a grade of C or higher
Offered: As needed

Description: Multidisciplinary course explaining the scope of bioinformatics, discussing computational methods, strategies and software tools for sequence analysis, and protein structure prediction.

Catalog page: https://catalog.morgan.edu/preview_course_nopop.php?catoid=26&coid=55597
